name: Private Pilot Readiness
recommendedUse: Use after Organisation Onboarding to decide whether a First Nations organisation or initiative can move from public sample coordination into a controlled private pilot without leaking real data or confusing official membership, payment, access needs, or authority.
safetyRule: Private pilot controls are public templates only. No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.

readinessGates.title: Pilot authority named
readinessGates.evidence: Written approval naming who can start pause and close the private pilot
readinessGates.stop_condition: Pilot proceeds on informal interest only

readinessGates.title: Privacy notice approved
readinessGates.evidence: Plain-language notice covers purpose fields retention access deletion and official handoff
readinessGates.stop_condition: People submit private fields without a reviewed privacy notice

readinessGates.title: Minimum field list locked
readinessGates.evidence: Only fields required for the private test are listed and justified
readinessGates.stop_condition: Nice-to-have fields are collected because they might be useful later

readinessGates.title: Toastmasters pathway separate
readinessGates.evidence: Official applications signatures member numbers fees and charter roster stay in official workflow
readinessGates.stop_condition: Governance Commons stores official Toastmasters paperwork

readinessGates.title: Access needs private support path
readinessGates.evidence: Access needs go to named support role only and are not exported publicly
readinessGates.stop_condition: Access needs appear in screenshots issue trackers or public CSV/JSON

readinessGates.title: Private environment separated
readinessGates.evidence: Private pilot has separate auth backups logs admin list and no public indexing
readinessGates.stop_condition: Private data is placed in the static public package

readinessGates.title: Role/access matrix approved
readinessGates.evidence: Every role has allowed access exclusions and removal route
readinessGates.stop_condition: Organisation supporters receive member-level or admin access by default

readinessGates.title: Consent and withdrawal path tested
readinessGates.evidence: Participant can ask what is stored change track withdraw or request deletion
readinessGates.stop_condition: Withdrawal requires manual guesswork or is not recorded

readinessGates.title: Incident response route ready
readinessGates.evidence: Named contact 24-hour triage containment notification and cleanup steps
readinessGates.stop_condition: Data exposure has no owner or response clock

readinessGates.title: Cultural and conduct escalation path
readinessGates.evidence: Questions complaints inappropriate content and unsafe behaviour have a named path
readinessGates.stop_condition: Sensitive issues are handled by public comments or ad hoc messages

readinessGates.title: Evidence pack excludes private data
readinessGates.evidence: Screenshots and reports use redacted/fake records only

readinessGates.title: Private Decidim mapping approved
readinessGates.evidence: Components permissions registration settings exports and admins are documented
readinessGates.stop_condition: Public sample mapping is copied into private pilot without permission review

readinessGates.title: Closeout and deletion rule ready
readinessGates.evidence: Pilot end date retention period export owner deletion owner and archived evidence rules
readinessGates.stop_condition: Pilot records remain indefinitely without approval

readinessGates.title: Go/no-go decision meeting scheduled
readinessGates.evidence: Decision agenda uses gates scenarios incidents data map and open risks
readinessGates.stop_condition: Pilot advances because the demo looks polished

testScenarios.test: A demo-first participant stays out of charter-ready counts
testScenarios.expected_result: Record is tagged demo-first and no official fields are requested

testScenarios.test: A founding-member candidate is routed to official paperwork outside the demo
testScenarios.expected_result: Private workflow records referral only and official forms stay external

testScenarios.test: Minimum field list blocks unapproved fields
testScenarios.expected_result: Address access needs member number and payment fields are not public demo fields

testScenarios.test: Access-need message reaches only the support role
testScenarios.expected_result: No public screenshot issue CSV or JSON contains the access detail

testScenarios.test: Organisation supporter can offer mentoring without member-data access
Officer interest is summarised without publishing names
testScenarios.expected_result: Public view shows fake/aggregate readiness only

testScenarios.test: Sponsorship/payment reconciliation is kept outside Governance Commons
testScenarios.expected_result: Public and private pilot records hold status only not card or fee data

testScenarios.test: Official Toastmasters paperwork handoff is logged without storing forms
testScenarios.expected_result: Evidence says handed off externally with no forms attached

testScenarios.test: Participant changes from founding-member path to demo-first
testScenarios.expected_result: Count updates and deletion/retention decision is recorded

testScenarios.test: Private field appears in wrong place during rehearsal
testScenarios.expected_result: Incident clock starts record is removed reviewer notified and root cause logged

testScenarios.test: QA screenshots and reports use redacted/fake records
testScenarios.expected_result: Evidence can be published without personal data

testScenarios.test: Pilot closes and records are exported/deleted under the retention rule
testScenarios.expected_result: Closeout checklist identifies owner date export deletion and remaining risks

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can coordinate private pilot and technical handoff
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: Cannot replace official Toastmasters acceptance or community authority

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can approve start pause go/no-go and closeout
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: Cannot approve more data than the privacy/data gate allows

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can review fields notices retention deletion and exports
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: No unrestricted operational access unless needed
Cannot publish support needs or share them with organisation supporters

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can configure private pilot environment permissions backups and logs
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: Cannot use public repo/screenshots for private records

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can manage official forms roster sponsorship/payment checks and submission
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: Official paperwork is not stored in Governance Commons public package

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can refer host mentor or review public sample content
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: No access to member data access needs payments or official acceptance decisions

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can review fake/redacted evidence and test results
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: No private raw records in public QA evidence

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can review complaints conduct concerns and moderation decisions
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: No public handling of sensitive concerns

roleAccessRules.allowed_access: Can see own notice pathway withdrawal route and contact point
roleAccessRules.hard_exclusion: No access to other participant records

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Can be published as fake/sample or approved public summary
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Public wording implies official membership or acceptance

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Private pilot may store current track with consent
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Track is counted as charter-ready without official confirmation

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Private pilot only if privacy notice and access control are approved
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Copied into public demo GitHub screenshots or public exports

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Store confirmation only where necessary and avoid birthdate unless required
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Birthdate or identity document is stored without approval

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Official process only or encrypted private record if explicitly approved
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Appears in public sample data or screenshots

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Named support role only minimum necessary separate from public exports
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Access needs visible to supporters or public reviewers

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Private planning only until consent and official confirmation
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Real names published as officer slate before election/confirmation
Forms are stored in public package or fake-data sandbox

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: External finance/official workflow only status summary allowed if approved
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Card fee receipt or bank details enter Governance Commons

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Approved role summary may be public contact details stay private
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Support offer creates authority over members or acceptance

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Private incident log with named owner and retention rule
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Incident details are published or unmanaged

dataTransferRules.transfer_rule: Can be published after review using fake IDs and aggregate findings
dataTransferRules.stop_condition: Test evidence reveals private fields or individual identities
